task_summaries.task_scope: Characterize feature subsets by measuring diversity and class-conditioned variation within features from evidence refs e9 to e12 and e23 to e25
Investigate data processing or measurement steps that could produce low diversity features using evidence refs e9 to e12 and e23 to e25
Assess how stable and variable features contribute to class discrimination focusing on evidence refs e9 to e12 and e23 to e25
Evaluate potential trade-offs in model reliance on stable versus variable features using evidence refs e9 to e12 and e23 to e25
